name: binocart-static-prototype
description: BinoCart static prototype packaged for web and Android through Capacitor.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && node scripts/run-capacitor.js sync android
scripts.android:add: npm run build:web && node scripts/run-capacitor.js add android
scripts.android:build: npm run cap:sync && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-android-debug.ps1
scripts.android:run: npm run build:web && node scripts/run-capacitor.js run android
